creator: znerd@FreeBSD.org
text:
The Blackdown Linux JDK 1.2.2 is outdated. The current version is FCS, not
RC4.

See:

http://www.blackdown.org/java-linux/java2-status/jdk1.2-status.html#i386

How-To-Repeat: $ grep ^DISTNAME /usr/ports/java/linux-jdk/Makefile
DISTNAME=       jdk-1.2.2-RC4-linux-i386-glibc-2.1.2
